required_condition: Inter-annotator kappa >= 0.60 and CPFC kappa >= 0.60 demonstrated
example_sentence: CPFC achieves ordinal diagnostic resolution with pattern kappa of 0.67.
The protocol-defined failure-pattern differentiation identifies distinct degradation categories.
First-degradation-step localization agrees with annotators at 74% exact and 99% within-one-step.

required_condition: Blinding protocol documented; unblinding after annotation
example_sentence: Annotations were collected against an independent blinded annotation reference.

required_condition: Kappa >= 0.60 for both onset and pattern
example_sentence: The study achieved statistically meaningful external agreement (onset kappa=0.69, pattern kappa=0.65).
Within-task-family ordinal pattern stability is supported by R2=0.72 (caveat: model-behavior summary only).
The system uses externally checkable checkpoints with per-step verification.

required_condition: Protocol documented in codebook; not real-time
example_sentence: We applied a post-hoc diagnostic protocol to characterize chain degradation.
Results represent a population-level diagnostic summary of 100 sampled cases.
